block_16: Most Profitable Trade of the Week
block_42: Did you know that the GBP/USD currency pair is also known as “The Cable” and why? The thing is, before satellite and fiber-optic internet appeared, the data between the London and New York exchanges was passed with a giant steel cable under the Atlantic ocean. This allowed the currency rates' synchronization between the two stock exchanges. Today people don't use it any more. Still, the term is sometimes used in modern world.
